tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Capo: None
Tuning: Standard
A/N: Sorry if the chords/lyrics are wrong,
i wrote this by ear and the lyrics are from
http://www.azlyrics.com/lyrics/sia/elasticheart.html
Hope this helps!

        
[Verse]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]
   And another one bites the dust[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
But why can I not conquer love?[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]                           [ch]E[/ch]
And I might have thought that we were one[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
Wanted to fight this war without weapons[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]
And I wanted it, I wanted it bad[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
But there was so many red flags[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]
Now another one bites the dust[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F#m[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Yeah, lets be clear, I trust no one[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]    
You did not break me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
 Im still fighting for peace[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]
Well Ive got a thick skin and an elastic heart[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]     
But your blade it might be too sharp[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
Im like a rubber band until you pull too hard[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
I may snap and I move fast[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
But you won't see me fall apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Cause I ve got an elastic heart[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
Ive got an elastic heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch] 
Yeah, I ve got an elastic heart[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]                            [ch]E[/ch]
   And I will stay up through the night[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
Let's be clear, won't close my eyes[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]
And I know that I can survive[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I'll walk through fire to save my life[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]
And I want it, I want my life so bad[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]

Then another one bites the dust[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
